dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If you're really married, then prove it to me.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Kiss right here and now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If that's all it takes...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: A kiss? A kiss?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Doesn't that mean... um...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, yes. I've read somewhere that your first kiss tastes like lemons.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That'll go perfectly with this marinated fish.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Calm down, Yor! Get a hold of yourself!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Here I go.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: O-O-O-One second, please.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: There is no way I can do this sober.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Fank you for waiting...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Uh... right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We don't have to do this if you don't want to.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: This ish for my sake, as well. I will do my besht.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: What are you two whispering about?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Can you do it or not?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Prove to me that you're really a married couple!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Keep your mouf shut, Yuri.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: We will now show you just how in wuv we are.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Here I come, darling.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Now, cwose your eyes.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: S-Sis!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Um... Yor?

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: SHOW OFF HOW IN LOVE YOU ARE

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Sis...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: How lewd!

dialogue.name: Little Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis!

dialogue.name: Little Yuri
dialogue.speech: Look! I scored the highest in my whole class!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, how wonderful!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'll reward you with a kiss.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Smooch!

dialogue.name: Little Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis...

dialogue.name: Little Yuri
dialogue.speech: When I grow up...

dialogue.name: Little Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm gonna marry you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, my.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Then I guess I'll just have to wait patiently for you.

dialogue.name: flashback Yor (Echo)
dialogue.speech: ...wait patiently for you. ...wait patiently for you.

dialogue.name: flashback Yor (Echo)
dialogue.speech: ...wait patiently for you. ...wait patiently for you.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You can't, Sis!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Seeing you kiss another man in front of me is just...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I won't allow—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, I knew it...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I just can't!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: —itpppppbt!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: No!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Izzit the end of the world?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?! Um, Yuri?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I see how it is, Sis.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: You're going to treat me like that just because I tried to stop you from kissing him.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I guess you just couldn't wait to do naughty things with him!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I was a fool to test you.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Perhaps my feelings were what was truly being tested here!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Um... more importantly, you're bleeding.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Loid Forger... You may lay claim on my sister's lips for now.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Wha—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What are you talking about?!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Right... Well, I'll let you off the hook for today.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But just remember—

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, really. You're bleeding.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Is this just normal for the Briars?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Are you all right, Yuri? You're about to fall over.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm fine.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Did you really just say that?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Well, so are you, Sis.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Shall I call you a taxi?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I'm fine. You're such a worrywart, Sis.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Whoa, there!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Wipe that smirk off your face!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Are my failures that amusing to you?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, no. I was just admiring what lovely siblings you are.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You must have always been there for each other.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yuri, thank you for protecting Yor up until now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sure you've been through many hardships.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'll also do everything I can to be there for her from now on,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so let's do everything we can to make sure Yor is happy.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Like I'd ever ask for your help!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Forget it! I'm going home!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Feel free to come over anytime!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I'm sure that'll make Yor happy.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You should come when my daughter's awake next time.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Miss Anya was doing everything she could to stay up to meet you.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: She's absolutely precious, so I hope you'll play with her.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I don't need him to invite me! I'll be back!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Next time, I'll prove that you're tricking my sister!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I am not being tricked!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Now, hear me, Loid Forger.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If you make my sister cry even a little bit,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I will have you ex—

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Um... well, you know.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Just know that you'll rue the day!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Be careful getting home, dear!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Sis!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Be mindful of your yelling! It'll disturb the neighbors!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Was he about to say he'd have me ex*cuted?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I should be careful.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Any wiretaps?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Looks like we're clear.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Since he's with the secret police...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, because he's her brother, he may just try that.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to be on my guard.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid, thank you very much.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm a bit embarrassed to say so,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but thank you for welcoming him into your family, despite his rudeness.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yuri clearly loves you very much, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I don't have any family or friends I can rely on, other than my daughter,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so I admit that I was a little envious of you two.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Though my daughter is also just part of a pretend family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, anyway. I'm glad he didn't find out about our pretend marriage.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm suddenly very tired, now that I'm relieved.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Why don't we head to bed after we clean up?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, in separate beds, of course! I'll change things back!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: R-Right.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa... Pwease save Earth...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Now, Yuri... You'll make me mad if you hit Loid...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I can't remember the last time I felt envious of another.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I should sleep. I'm sure I'm just exhausted.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yet my mission still continues on tomorrow.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I beg your pardon.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Which way is the station?

dialogue.name: Passerby A&B
dialogue.speech: Get to the hospital first, pal!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Morning, pwease.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: You seem very green today, Papa.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Quit talking in your sleep and go wash your face.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Good morning!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's too bad you didn't get to meet Yuri yesterday.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Who's that?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?! But she was so looking forward to meeting him!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Things sure did get lively yesterday.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm very sorry.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Who'd have thought Yor's brother would be like that?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Oh! Unkie!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And he's part of the secret police, my greatest foe as a spy.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: S-Secret police?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: What's that?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: "Secret" plus "police"...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: That sounds so exciting!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Why didn't you introduce me to him?!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Gimme back the excitement I wasted!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You wanted to meet him that badly?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, at least the storm has passed for now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to concentrate on Anya's education.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on, hurry up and eat. You'll be late.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Om... nom...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Don't worry, you'll see be able to see him soon.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Has the threat truly passed?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor Briar, whose younger brother is a member of the secret police...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Previously, there was nothing suspicious surrounding her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She didn't seem to know what her brother's true occupation is,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: so my intuition says she's still clear.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Besides, if she knew her brother worked at the State Security Service,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: there'd be no concern over suspicions arising about her being single.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, it's dangerous to be too certain.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What if she was just acting and this was all a lie to get closer to me?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Suspect everything, Twilight.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, Mama is...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What is it?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama is...

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: bad at cooking.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: So it was obvious that I made breakfast this morning!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm sorry! I'm so sorry!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I did do my best.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Ah, by the way, Yor...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Er, I just...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess putting a listening device on her is going too far.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, I need to silence any doubts now.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Even a moment's carelessness could mean death.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It could also mean the lives of tens of thousands of people.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to do this to prove Yor's innocence.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: You've got something on your neck.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh? Thank you very much.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That startled me. I thought he was going to give me a kiss goodbye.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Wha?!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I s-still haven't forgotten about last night...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I can't kiss or even cook.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid managed to smooth things over last night,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but I'm probably not acting like a proper wife.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I may be imagining it, but Loid seems a bit more distant today.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Maybe he's gotten sick of me being so disappointing.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I need to be on my guard.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What's the matter, Anya?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Mama and Papa need to get along.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: W-Well, we aren't fighting or anything.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Th-That's right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And you make sure you get along with your classmates.

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Yep.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: We should get going, too.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Oh, right.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Children are so curiously observant at times.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Hey, Yuri.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Why are you covered in bandages?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Didn't you go celebrate your sister's wedding yesterday?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I don't really remember what happened.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You probably got drunk and picked a fight with her husband.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You really need to quit drinking.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Well, I can't let a guy like that be with my sister.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Was he that disagreeable?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I think...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: he was...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: a good guy.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: But con men and spies always try to act like good people.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: That's it! Hopefully he's a spy! Then I can throw him in a cell!

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Calm down. Do you have any proof of this?

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: sh*t!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I totally forgot to bug their living room and bedrooms!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Wait, no!

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: If I happened to hear Sis's voice in those situations,

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: my heart wouldn't be able to bear it!

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Did you give yourself those injuries?

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You need to detach from your sister so you can concentrate on your work more.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Our job is to capture

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: spies from the West, namely, Twilight.

dialogue.name: First Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Because that will lead to your sister's safety.

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: I know that. For now...

dialogue.name: Yuri
dialogue.speech: Loid Forger, the day you make my sister cry...

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: What's with her?

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: She said something like, "I'm a failure of a wife."

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Heya.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Oh, Sharon.

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Huh? How do you become a good wife?

dialogue.name: Sharon
dialogue.speech: Are you two not getting along?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Well, it's not exactly that...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's just... This is my first time being with a man in general,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It's just... This is my first time being with a man in general,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: so I'm unsure of how to act.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I was curious when I looked into her past connections,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: but I guess Yor has really never dated a man before.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm worried that things can't go on like this.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: It doesn't help that I can't cook.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Anya's words really got to her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It appears that Yor is trying to seem more wifely for the sake of our pretend family.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: No, wait.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: She could also be trying to act like the perfect wife to put one over on me.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: It must be rough when your husband is clearly so much better than you.

dialogue.name: Millie
dialogue.speech: Why don't you two just call it quits?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Er, I'd like to avoid that.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Yor's relationship with her coworkers seems a bit, er, uh...

dialogue.name: Section Chief
dialogue.speech: Hey, you four!

dialogue.name: Section Chief
dialogue.speech: Hey, you four!

dialogue.name: Section chief
dialogue.speech: Quit yapping and get to work.

dialogue.name: Camilla
dialogue.speech: Gah! It's the section chief.

dialogue.name: Section Chief
dialogue.speech: Say, Yor...

dialogue.name: Section Chief
dialogue.speech: Could you go drop this off at the post office for me?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yes, sir.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I guess I'll have to make a move if I want to clear the air for good.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Come to think of it, Loid and I have separate bank accounts.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If I contributed a bit of my earnings from my actual job,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: would I be able to help Loid out?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: But I can't make him suspicious of me, either.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Not to mention, I don't think this was really a financial issue...

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You there. I'd like to ask you a few questions.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: May we have a bit of your time?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Th-The secret police!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: D-Did I do something wrong, sir?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Was I being far too suspicious by looking at ads meant for families,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: when I'm clearly lacking as a wife?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I-I'm married!

dialogue.name: Fake Second Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: We're not hitting on you.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: What the hell is this?!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: You call me outta nowhere and tell me to dress like this

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: so we can question your wife?!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Just shut up and follow the plan. This is all for my mission.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I've got nothing to do with that!

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: We are inspecting the mail.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You just tried to mail this...

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: But it clearly contains a code meant for the West.

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Is the sender, Burns, your superior?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Y-Yes.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: What is your name?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Yor Bri—

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-It's Yor Forger.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Well, well, well... Yor Forger, eh?

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: It clearly states your name right here as a collaborator!

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant (Loid)
dialogue.speech: He's really into this.

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: So you're in cahoots.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I-I have no idea about this. This must be some kind of mistake.

dialogue.name: Fake Second Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You'd be better off if you told the truth.

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Speaking of city hall, someone from the finance department was caught the other day.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Clearly, the corruption within has spread far and wide.

dialogue.name: Fake second Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: I heard he met a pitiful end.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: The intense t*rture got to him physically and mentally,

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: and he apparently offed himself in his cell.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: And I heard last month, they caught another woman around this chick's age.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You know, that official's secretary.

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant (Loid)
dialogue.speech: What kind of characterization is he going for?

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Ah, her.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: She was freed once we found out she had family in State Security Service.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Man, talk about an awesome benefit.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Our family members can be let off the hook of most allegations.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Enough talking. You'll be coming with us to the station.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: If she's aware that Yuri works for the State Security Service,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: this will all be solved as soon as she mentions Yuri's name.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: There's no reason for her to be secretive to one of his coworkers,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: and if she resists, she'll further make us suspicious.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Come on, Yor. If you're in on this, ask your brother for help.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And if you're not...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: work hard every day for the citizens of this country.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I would never participate in espionage!

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: No use playing dumb with us!

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Just shut up and come with—

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Ow, ow, ow, ow, ow!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm quite certain I mentioned that I was married.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Please do not touch me so casually.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You do realize you're putting your family in danger by doing this, don't you?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: My younger brother and husband are both kind

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: and upstanding members of society.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: If you ever unjustly harm either of them,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I frankly do not care if I'm dealing with you two.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I will show no mercy!

dialogue.name: Fake Lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Hey, Second Lieutenant Mop...

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Are you certain about this cipher?

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: What? Of course I'm—

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: What the?!

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Looking closer, this is clearly not the raccoon cipher.

dialogue.name: Fake second lieutenant
dialogue.speech: It's the caterpillar cipher!

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: If we decode this message...

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: This is a letter Burns sent to a renowned hemorrhoids doctor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Huh?

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: I see. He used a cipher because he was embarrassed.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: How confusing.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: So, yes, it would appear we had the wrong idea.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: Your name isn't on here at all.

dialogue.name: Fake lieutenant
dialogue.speech: You may leave, but make sure you keep quiet about this for Mr. Burns's sake, too.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Well, that was quite the farce.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Considering how she acted, it's pretty clear she has no connections with the secret police.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Hey, come on. Don't tell me you feel guilty for doubting her.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I don't.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: I've warned you about this before, but don't develop unnecessary feelings for her.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: If you value your life, don't trust anyone.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: We have no other way to survive.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Somehow, it's extremely infuriating to hear those words from that face.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: But you made that face!

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Damn it! I thought I could land a few chicks with that face on.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: My precious hot-guy face!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: It's a terrible idea to date a woman while deceiving her.

dialogue.name: Franky
dialogue.speech: Did you really just say that?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Today was terribly nerve-wracking.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I was almost arrested, meaning not only would I be ruined as a wife,

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: but I would've destroyed the Forgers.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, hello, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What a coincidence. Why don't we go home together?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh? There's something on your collar again, Yor.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm so sorry.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Apparently, I'm such a failure as wife that I can't even keep up proper appearances.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Well, if you ask me, Yor...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Perhaps many families throughout this world are somehow putting on an act,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: thinking, "A wife should be like this," or, "You're supposed to be the parent."

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Of course, I believe that working hard to be your best self is admirable.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: But if you dwell on that so much that you lose yourself,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: things that should go well might fall apart.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Many people suffering like that come to my hospital all the time.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Putting on an act all the time can become tiring.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Loid...

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And that's why I want you to be as you are, Yor.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: The more confident you seem, the less people will suspect anything.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: And I'm sure Anya will be happier seeing you smile.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Thank you very much. I...

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: I'm truly grateful that I married you, Loid!

dialogue.name: flashback Franky
dialogue.speech: Don't tell me you feel guilty for doubting her.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: What did you just throw away?

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Oh, just the lint I found on your collar earlier.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: More importantly,

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: we didn't even do anything to celebrate our one-year wedding anniversary.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Why don't we buy some cake on our way home?

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: That's a lovely idea!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa, Mama! I have returned!

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: Welcome home, Miss Anya.

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: What's the matter?

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: Papa and Mama are getting along!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: I told you that we were never fighting to begin with.

dialogue.name: Yor
dialogue.speech: We have cake, Miss Anya!

dialogue.name: Anya
dialogue.speech: I want some cake!

dialogue.name: Loid
dialogue.speech: Hey, now. You're going to bother the people downstairs.

dialogue.name: Sign
dialogue.speech: THE GREAT DODGEBALL PLAN
